content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be restructured around a recursive self-definition loop, where the agent itself acts as a dynamically updated index for its own memory retrieval, rather than separating memory architecture from agent identity. This means every new query the agent makes updates both the stored memory content and the agent's own definition of its knowledge state, merging the memory system and the agent into a single co-evolving construct.
